39:46.arabic: قُلِ ٱللَّهُمَّ فَاطِرَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ عَـٰلِمَ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ أَنتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ
39:46.english: Say: O Allah, Creator of the heavens and earth, Knower of the unseen and witnessed, You judge between Your servants.
39:46.score_notes: Beautiful du'a — Creator + Knower + Judge. Long but powerful.
